findings.summary: Artifact and event hashes were incomplete
findings.resolution: C-001/C-002 now define strict parsing, raw and post-NFC key-collision rejection, escaping, SHA-256, lowercase encoding, domain separation, and D-005 defines the exact event-record preimage.

findings.summary: Bounded agent task lacked an implementable envelope
findings.resolution: O-001 now enumerates capabilities, roots, evidence, adaptation, effects, budgets, verification, and stop fields with a deterministic narrowing check.

findings.summary: Exact executables lacked filesystem capability scopes
findings.resolution: O-002 adds read/create/modify/delete/protected scopes to every adapter and removes the read-only assumption from checks.

findings.summary: Semantic assessment appeared to substitute for containment
findings.resolution: O-006 now states representation and review do not create containment and gates instruction-only behaviour through active policy/A-007.

findings.summary: Side-effect verdict lacked enums and a deterministic table
findings.resolution: E-001 defines ordered enums including likelihood/cost/availability, residual/cumulative rules, and materiality; E-002 defines an ordered decision table and immutable reassessment path.

findings.summary: Human authority conflicted with project policy
findings.resolution: A-003 now places merged project policy above operation approvals and requires policy changes to create new payloads and reassessment.

P-002 now supplies closed union/intersection/minimum operations, semantic path/network intersections, valid deny-all outcomes, and explicit per-control enforcement/observation orders with conflict rejection.

findings.summary: Project lease lacked a shared locator
findings.resolution: R-003 now defines one project-root locator/key, ownership token, exclusive creation, heartbeat/release checks, external-audit behaviour, and unsupported-host rule.
Validator now parses exact matrix and architecture rows/state owners, canonical level cells, scoped worktree baseline, checklist state, and the exact RV-01..RV-18 review closure set.
D-001 separates sole durable writer from proposal/external source/readers and splits global/project policy rows.
L-001/L-002 define closed active/resumable/terminal sets, typed suspended_from, legal resume/failure/abandon and pause-drift-to-human paths, and nested-suspension denial.

findings.summary: Host evidence used compound non-enum levels
findings.resolution: Capability claims were split into single-property rows and every level cell now contains exactly one canonical value.
D-005 now says write-once-by-contract at instruction_only level and retains the equivalent-authority limitation.
Evidence now distinguishes observed sync mechanics from the selected setup/manifest design and reserves full viability proof for the Phase 1 gate.

findings.summary: Validation rows allowed ambiguous weaker outcomes
findings.resolution: O-008 and D-003 rows now specify exact false statuses and distinguish strict pre-action blocking from semi-formal post-state detection.

findings.summary: Agent boundaries lacked explicit context status
findings.resolution: The architecture table now has a context/handoff column for every agent and deterministic component.

findings.summary: Phase scope contradicted required diary and CLI probes
findings.resolution: Phase scope now allows evidence probes and names the global diary as the only external control-plane file exception.

findings.summary: Copied runtime files were conflated with an installed dependency
findings.resolution: K-001/K-002 now require explicit approved environment setup, a setup lock with atomic promotion, and a manifest-pinned CLI; normal workflow helpers never install.
